name: platform-claude
description: Lifecycle slash commands (/install, /upgrade, /bootstrap) for managing sauce from inside Claude Code. Owns claude-md-renderer.js (consumed by install.js step 6d). Always-on posture — subscribe in every consumer. v0.1.1 PATCH (v0.33.1): claude_md_row.row.path corrected from mechanism slug 'platform-claude' to canonical command body dest paths ('.claude/commands/<verb>.md') so /audit --claude-surface resolves to a real file and lands in `aligned` rather than `dead_path` severity bucket.

post_install.message: platform-claude@0.1.0 installed. Lifecycle slash commands /install /upgrade /bootstrap now available in Claude Code.
